entries.content: Kelly successfully planned a summer office party with a Golden Hour Garden Party theme, featuring fairy lights, a grazing table, and a curated playlist (Beyoncé, Doja Cat, Destiny's Child) avoiding classic rock
Kelly prefers modern, trendy aesthetic for events (elevated casual, Pinterest-inspired) and strongly dislikes classic rock/2009 iPod shuffle playlists for gatherings
Ryan once made Kelly a good playlist that she appreciated, though he noted it wasn't made specifically for her, which hurt her feelings
User successfully executed a Golden Hour Garden Party theme in June that was well-received by office staff
User prefers elevated, themed parties with intentional aesthetics (garden party, color palettes, decor) over casual/low-key office events
Golden Hour Garden Party was held in June and was successful
Kelly favors trendy, Instagram-worthy party elements like photo corners with ring lights, grazing tables, and current pop culture references
Ryan is currently doing a cleanse and Kelly considers dietary/wellness inclusion when planning events
